title: BUDGET BRIEF: EU negotiating positions harden up
summary_full: Today’s edition also looks at moves by wealthier EU states, which tend to be net contributors to the budget, to gain an advantage over poorer rivals in the battle over access to the bloc’s proposed €400 billion European Competitiveness Fund
